files.patch:
@@ -64,9 +64,9 @@
-// CompLevel               | return value | -XX:CompileCommand bitmask
-// -------------------------------------------------------------------
-// 0 (interpreter)         | N/A          |  N/A
-// 1 (C1)                  |   1          |    1
-// 2 (C1 + counters)       |   2          |   10
-// 3 (C1 + counters + mdo) |   4          |  100
-// 4 (C2/JVMCI)            |   8          | 1000
-// All C1 levels           |   7          |  111
-// All levels              |  15          | 1111
+// CompLevel               | -XX:CompileCommand bitmask
+// ----------------------------------------------------
+// 0 (interpreter)         |  N/A
+// 1 (C1)                  |    1
+// 2 (C1 + counters)       |   10
+// 3 (C1 + counters + mdo) |  100
+// 4 (C2/JVMCI)            | 1000
+// All C1 levels           |  111
+// All levels              | 1111
@@ -78,1 +78,1 @@
